data.title: Pacific Edge Grows Cxbladder Volumes as Medicare Policy Tailwinds Build
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Pacific Edge Limited ( (PFGTF) ) is now available.

Pacific Edge reported a 2.7% rise in total laboratory throughput to 5,582 Cxbladder tests in Q4 2026, driven by growth in both the U.S. and Asia-Pacific despite Medicare non-coverage, winter storm disruptions and a reduced sales force. The company highlighted increased sales force productivity, with more tests per sales FTE and per ordering clinician, as Triage continued to replace Detect in the U.S. portfolio.

Strategic momentum gathered around a potential Medicare policy shift after strong expert support for Cxbladder at a Novitas advisory meeting, reinforcing expectations of a positive local coverage determination in the coming year. Pacific Edge also secured major new reimbursement wins with Blue Cross Blue Shield plans and Highmark in the U.S., gained adoption at leading hospitals in Singapore and Australia, and advanced intellectual property protection for Triage Plus, underscoring its ambition to consolidate first-mover leadership in bladder cancer diagnostics.

More about Pacific Edge Limited

Pacific Edge Limited is a New Zealand-headquartered global cancer diagnostics company specialising in non-invasive genomic urine tests for bladder cancer, marketed under the Cxbladder brand. It develops and commercialises diagnostic and prognostic tests for patients with hematuria or under surveillance for recurrent urothelial cancer, serving markets in the U.S., Australasia, Asia, South America and Israel through CLIA-certified laboratories in New Zealand and the U.S.

See more insights into PFGTF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: M-tron Industries Extends Expiration of Stock Rights Offering
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

M-tron Industries Inc ( (MPTI) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 9, 2026, M-tron Industries, Inc. announced that it had extended the expiration of its previously launched rights offering for common stock, originally distributed on March 30, 2026, from April 15 to 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on April 20, 2026. The extension is intended to facilitate administration of the capital-raising effort while preserving all existing terms, including the $59.00 subscription price, the five‑for‑one rights structure, and the over‑subscription privilege for fully participating shareholders of record.

Under the unchanged terms detailed in the offering materials, five rights are required to purchase one share of common stock at $59.00, with no fractional shares to be issued. The decision to prolong the window gives investors and intermediaries additional time to process exercises and over‑subscriptions, potentially supporting fuller participation and bolstering M-tron’s equity base as it pursues its business objectives.

The most recent analyst rating on (MPTI) stock is a Buy with a $81.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on M-tron Industries Inc stock, see the MPTI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MPTI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MPTI is a Outperform.

Overall score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (growth, profitability improvement, rising operating/free cash flow, and very low leverage) and a positive earnings outlook supported by a sharply higher backlog and improved liquidity. The score is tempered by margin/tariff headwinds, dilution risk from the rights offering, and only moderate (not surging) technical momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on MPTI stock, click here.

More about M-tron Industries Inc

M-tron Industries, Inc. operates in the frequency and spectrum control sector, designing, manufacturing and marketing highly engineered, high‑reliability components and solutions. The engineering‑centric company supports customers throughout the product life cycle and runs design and manufacturing facilities in Florida and South Dakota, with additional operations in Hong Kong and India.

data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Kiwi Property Group ( (KWIPF) ).

Kiwi Property has appointed Sarah Theodore as its new Chief Financial Officer, adding more than two decades of experience across banking, infrastructure, property and retirement living in New Zealand and Australia to its executive team. Her background in listed company finance, global capital markets and investment advisory, along with established relationships with institutional investors, banks and analysts, is expected to strengthen Kiwi Property’s financial strategy and capital management, with interim CFO duties handled by Tiniya du Plessis until Theodore starts in late July 2026.

The leadership change underscores Kiwi Property’s focus on deep capital markets expertise and investor engagement as it manages its substantial real estate portfolio in a competitive property sector. For stakeholders, the move signals continuity and potential enhancement in financial governance, balance sheet management and market-facing communication, supported in the interim by du Plessis’s extensive corporate reporting and assurance experience.

More about Kiwi Property Group

Kiwi Property Group, listed on the NZX and a member of the S&P/NZX 20 Index, is one of New Zealand’s largest listed property companies. It owns and manages a diversified portfolio of high-quality mixed-use, retail and office assets, aiming to provide investors with reliable exposure to the New Zealand real estate market through active portfolio management.

Clarke Inc. ( (TSE:CKI) ) has shared an update.

Clarke Inc. has completed a normal course issuer bid, buying back and cancelling 682,542 common shares at an average price of CAD $21.75, representing 5% of its shares outstanding at the program’s start. The board and management view the buyback as a prudent use of capital that underscores confidence in the company’s long‑term value and offers shareholders enhanced liquidity and flexibility.

The company plans to renew the share repurchase program for another 12‑month period upon its August 11, 2026 expiry, continuing a long-standing strategy of returning capital through issuer bids. Since 2015, Clarke has repurchased and cancelled more than 10.7 million shares, a pattern that has steadily reduced the share count to 12,968,315 outstanding and may support per‑share metrics and shareholder value over time.

data.title: CEA Industries Adopts 2026 Inducement Equity Compensation Plan
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from CEA Industries ( (BNC) ) is now available.

On March 9, 2026, CEA Industries appointed Brent Miller as its new chief financial officer and, on April 6, 2026, the board approved a 2026 Inducement Plan authorizing up to 1,000,000 shares of common stock for equity awards to new employees. Under this plan, the board granted Miller time-based restricted stock units covering 363,636 shares, vesting over four years starting with 25% after the first year, in a package designed to induce him to join the company.

The RSUs are subject to continued service, with pro-rata vesting on certain terminations, full vesting upon death or disability, forfeiture for cause or covenant breaches, and full acceleration following a qualifying termination within 12 months of a change in control. Announced via press release on April 8, 2026, the award structure and broader inducement plan highlight CEA Industries’ use of equity-based incentives to attract senior talent and align new executives’ interests with shareholders through long-term stock-based compensation.

The most recent analyst rating on (BNC) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CEA Industries stock, see the BNC Stock Forecast page.

Score is supported primarily by improved TTM balance-sheet strength and exceptional TTM cash generation, but capped by weak/negative operating profitability, strong bearish technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD), and elevated governance/event risk from the ongoing control/asset-agreement disputes.

To see Spark’s full report on BNC stock, click here.

More about CEA Industries

An update from Greenidge Generation Holdings ( (GREE) ) is now available.

On April 9, 2026, Greenidge Generation Holdings reported the final results of its exchange offer for its 8.50% Senior Notes due 2026, which began on March 11 and expired on April 8, 2026. Noteholders tendered $1.44 million of the $36.66 million outstanding, to be exchanged for 10.00% Senior Notes due 2030 and Class A common stock, with settlement expected on April 10, 2026.

Following the offer, $35.23 million of the original 2026 notes will remain outstanding, while Greenidge plans to issue about $1.46 million in new 2030 notes and 114,890 Class A shares. The company also disclosed that FINRA denied its request to list the new notes on the OTC Markets platform, leaving liquidity and tradability uncertain and potentially requiring investors to bear the risk of holding the new securities for an extended period.

The most recent analyst rating on (GREE) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Greenidge Generation Holdings stock, see the GREE Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Ximen Mining Secures Key Water Licences for Kenville Gold Mine Build-Out
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Ximen Mining ( (TSE:XIM) ) is now available.

Ximen Mining has secured two water licences under British Columbia’s Water Sustainability Act for its Kenville Gold Mine project near Nelson, covering both the Venango property, where a new underground portal and decline are planned, and the adjoining Election property. The licences remove a key regulatory hurdle and position the company to begin mine-site construction once final engineering work on flood protection, foundations and road stability is completed, marking a critical step toward advancing Kenville as a cornerstone asset in its regional gold portfolio.

The move is expected to accelerate project timelines at Kenville, potentially enhancing Ximen’s production prospects and strengthening its foothold in the southeastern B.C. gold sector. With the water-use approvals in place and remaining pre-construction requirements nearing completion, Ximen is entering the final phase before breaking ground on the underground decline, a milestone that could have material implications for the company’s development pipeline and stakeholder expectations.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:XIM) stock is a Sell with a C$0.07 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ximen Mining stock, see the TSE:XIM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on XIM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, XIM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses/cash burn, and negative equity increasing financing risk). Technicals add only modest support with neutral RSI and very strong stochastic, but longer-term trend signals remain negative. Valuation provides limited support given a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on XIM stock, click here.

More about Ximen Mining

Ximen Mining Corp. is a Canadian precious metals company focused on gold and silver projects in southern British Columbia. Its key assets include the Kenville Gold Mine near Nelson, as well as the Amelia Gold Mine, the Brett Epithermal Gold Project, and the Treasure Mountain Silver Project, the latter currently advanced under an option agreement with a partner funding development.

data.title: CSLM Digital Asset Posts 2025 PFIC Tax Statement
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd Class A ( (KOYN) ) has issued an update.

On April 9, 2026, CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd announced it had posted its PFIC Annual Information Statement for fiscal year 2025 on its website to support U.S. shareholders with their tax reporting. The statement covers the period from August 28, 2025 to December 31, 2025 and provides per-share per-day ordinary earnings of $0.0011226332, with no net capital gain or distributions in cash or property recorded for holders of Class A public ordinary shares.

The company also confirmed it will allow shareholders to inspect and copy its permanent books and records needed to verify PFIC ordinary earnings and each investor’s pro rata share, underscoring a commitment to transparency and regulatory compliance. These disclosures, signed on April 8, 2026 by the chief financial officer and co-chief executive officer, help U.S. investors complete Form 8621 and clarify the tax implications of holding the company’s shares for the 2025 tax period.

More about CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd Class A

CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd is a Cayman Islands-incorporated special purpose acquisition company focused on the digital asset sector. The company issues Class A public ordinary shares and is treated as a passive foreign investment company for U.S. tax purposes, requiring detailed annual tax disclosures for its predominantly U.S. shareholder base.

Average Trading Volume: 67,443

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $317.2M
